title: Living in Boulder Vlog 3 - 12 - 2017: one kilometer in background

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog (12:35am) updating on his day in Boulder. He spent the day working on writing an intro/manual for his website, which he plans to put on Patreon, and mentions a background concept involving one-kilometer diameter circles overlaid on the world for spatial calibration.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: most exciting thing he's ever done
wants it to be a masterpiece, aiming for ~20 pages
waiting for sunnier weather before taking and uploading them

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It is currently 12:35 am on March 13th, 2013.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today was his second day working.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is using a background of thousand-meter diameter circles for calibration.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is working on a project and writing an intro for his website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: This is the most fun thing he has ever done.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His mom and girlfriend are helping him with the project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He has 13 pages of text so far.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is aiming for about 20 pages.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to put the manual on Patreon and other websites.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is waiting for sunny weather to take good photos for his project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He needs to charge the battery.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to listen to his recording again to make it perfect.

transcript.text: Hi, Living in Boulder V-Log for March 12th, 2013.
It is currently 12.35 a.m. on March 13th, 2013.
That's right, right?
Yep, March 13th.
Okay, so...
Today...
I think I got up at like 11 or something.
Got to have insomnia, I think.
I think I was working until like 2 or something last night.
But yeah, I was working.
Like today, I think it was my second day.
Oh, background?
Oh, I haven't made it yet, but I'm going to make my background...
The 1,000 meters, the 1 kilometer diameter circles.
All over the world to help.
I'll have a name and stuff for it.
But you know, it's just to help calibrate spaces.
So, uh...
Today, I got up and I...
I didn't do anything to sell my band because I was just super...
Hooked on my thing because I only started it yesterday.
My new project...
Is, um...
Writing my intro.
I never wrote an intro on my website.
Everything was just undone.
So this is exciting.
This is like the most funnest thing I've ever done.
And luckily I've helped get my mom there, get my girlfriend.
Helping out a lot.
And she was like a tight setter or whatever for an ad company.
So, like, don't capitalize that.
So, yeah, that's going to be fun.
I'm at like 13 and a half pages now, I think, worth of text.
And, um...
These are my probiotic gummies.
You're my probiotic, right?
Um...
Oh, man, that was my train of thought.
Yeah, 13 and a half pages.
And so...
I'm thinking about 20 pages.
It'll be like 20 pages.
I want to explain everything.
You know, I have my little explanation, my intro page.
But then I want to have the manual explain my whole website.
So then put it on Patreon.
Put my manual, my chapter on Patreon.
And then all sorts of other websites.
Yeah, so it's exciting.
I've been kind of waiting until it gets, um...
Sunny enough to take good photos of my man.
That's why I haven't taken photos of my man yet.
And then I'll upload it to the site.
And upload other sites, too.
I have to charge the battery.
Yeah, so, um...
I think I'll go back and listen to it again.
I'll just listen to it.
Just fix it, listen to it.
You can listen to it now.
It's pretty good.
But I want to make it just, man, like a masterpiece.
Okay, so that's enough talking.
Peace out.
